error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters
title: WhatsApp Trigger node invalid parameter error
symptom: After updating to n8n 1.88.0, activating a specific workflow results in a 'Bad request - please check your parameters' error related to the WhatsApp Trigger node.
not_this_if: Error occurs in workflows not using the WhatsApp Trigger node
root_cause: The error occurs because the webhook for the WhatsApp Trigger node requires a secure HTTPS connection. If n8n is running over HTTP, it can lead to invalid parameter errors when trying to activate the workflow.
fix_steps: Ensure that your n8n instance is deployed with HTTPS enabled
Redeploy n8n to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Deploy n8n with HTTPS enabled and then activate the workflow.
